summary: Frontend E2E validation of SchoolPay RD MVP (TanStack Start + React, localStorage-only, no backend). Verified route guard, login, students CRUD + confirm dialog, payment flow with balance reduction, monthly-fee generation (idempotent), persistence and logout. All 7 requested feature scenarios PASS.

issues: React SSR hydration mismatch warnings: 'data-tsd-source' attribute differs between server and client renders on <html>/<head>/<body>. Non-blocking, but noisy in console.

action_items: (Optional/low priority) Investigate the hydration mismatch on __root.tsx (data-tsd-source attribute lines differ SSR vs client). It doesn't break functionality but pollutes the console with a React hydration error.
critical_code_review_comments: session.ts / _shell.tsx guard is client-only (useEffect). Server renders shell briefly before redirect; acceptable for a demo but a small unauthenticated flash could occur on slow networks.
addPago clamps balance with Math.max(0, balance - monto), meaning payments larger than balance silently disappear as balance overflow. Fine for demo but may hide overpayments.
generarMensualidadesDelMes correctly filters to active students without an existing mensualidad for the current month (verified: 20 created for Julio 2026, 2nd click reported all already exist).
seed_data_creation: None. Test created transient students (TEST_...) which were subsequently deleted or left in localStorage; app persists via localStorage key 'schoolpay-rd-state-v1'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App runs on TanStack Start SSR proxied at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. No backend/Mongo. All data in localStorage. IMPORTANT selectors: nuevo-estudiante-btn, estudiante-form-dialog, form-nombre, guardar-estudiante-btn, estudiantes-tbody, editar-estudiante-<id>, eliminar-estudiante-<id>, eliminar-estudiante-dialog, cancelar-eliminar-btn, confirmar-eliminar-btn, estudiante-balance-<id>, registrar-pago-btn, pago-form-dialog, pago-estudiante/pago-concepto/pago-metodo (Radix triggers - open then wait 300-400ms before clicking [role=option]), pago-monto, pago-referencia, guardar-pago-btn, generar-mensualidades-btn, mensualidades-tbody, logout-button. When testing payment balance reduction, use a student with an existing balance (E001 has RD$4,500) since balance clamps at 0. Occasional 429 rate-limit errors on rapid navigation; add small waits.
